data.title: Write RED tests for apply-attribution-trailers.sh skeleton and JSONL deduplication
data.description: Create tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with: test_read_and_deduplicate_returns_single_value_for_duplicate_agents() (uses proper JSONL input: {"type":"agent","subagent_type":"dso:red-test-writer","model":"sonnet"}), test_read_and_deduplicate_preserves_two_distinct_agent_types(), test_check_git_version_stub_returns_0(). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
